references.title: [2108.13934] Robust Retrieval Augmented Generation for Zero-shot Slot Filling
[2104.06828] Ask what's missing and what's useful: Improving Clarification Question Generation using Global Knowledge

adjacent.resemblance: RAG-based zero-shot slot filling retrieves evidence to fill open slots in a schema; clarification question generation identifies what's missing and what's useful in a partial specification and generates targeted questions; GENIUS uses sketch-based masking to drive conditional text generation from incomplete structure. These collectively perform: detect gaps in a partial structure → use gaps as generative inputs → produce candidate completions.
adjacent.still_new: The specific move not yet performed by any hit: scoring a retrieved find against an anchor facet-by-facet with fuzzy membership, then treating the UNMATCHED facets specifically as generation slots whose content is extrapolated from the matched-facet structure plus the found source, with user reactions re-weighting which joints remain open. The iterative, user-reactive re-weighting of open joints and the use of the found source's matched structure as the extrapolation basis for filling its own unmatched facets is not present in any hit.
adjacent.reasoning: The slot-filling and sketch-generation hits come close enough to the same transfer — gap detection driving generation — to qualify as adjacent rather than novel; the difference is the facet-by-facet fuzzy scoring of a retrieved find against a user anchor, and the user-reactive joint re-weighting loop, which no hit performs. This is a small but real step beyond the closest cousins.

references.title: A Uniform Model of Computational Conceptual Blending
Self-Revising Discovery Systems for Science: A Categorical Framework for Agentic Artificial Intelligence

novel.resemblance: Computational blending frameworks (Eppe et al., Schorlemmer & Plaza) use category-theoretic colimits and generic spaces; the self-revising discovery paper uses iterative categorical revision; canonical colimit selection addresses colimit construction. All share components: morphisms, colimits, iterative refinement.
novel.still_new: No hit performs the specific move: treating the scoring act itself as the mechanism that incrementally constructs the generic space, where each accept/reject decision adds or deletes morphism edges and the colimit crystallizes only when the edge-set stabilizes. Every blending framework presupposes a generic space supplied before scoring begins; no hit makes the mapping the output of the scoring process rather than its input.
novel.reasoning: The blending literature hands the generic space to the algorithm as a precondition; the categorical AI papers revise hypotheses but do not build inter-domain morphism maps through a resonance-scoring loop. The specific transfer — scoring-as-morphism-construction, with the diagram as emergent output — is unperformed by any hit.

references.title: Detecting Knowledge Gaps from Conversational AI Interactions Using Curriculum Prerequisite Graphs
Hybrid Active Learning with Uncertainty-Weighted Embed dings

novel.resemblance: Active learning with uncertainty-weighted sampling allocates probe budget by information gain; information-directed tree search weights traversal by expected information value; prerequisite gap detection identifies structural gaps in knowledge. These share the ingredients of gap-detection and budget-weighted traversal.
novel.still_new: No hit performs the specific move: reading the SEMANTIC unspecified dimensions of a user's half-formed concept as a coordinate map, computing inferential leverage per unfilled dimension (how much would a resonant find here reduce uncertainty about the whole shape of the user's vision), and weighting a wandering agent's domain selection by that per-gap leverage score. Active learning weights by label uncertainty over a fixed feature space, not by which structural joints of a user's emerging concept are highest-yield for inferential closure.
novel.reasoning: The active learning hits allocate queries by uncertainty over a closed label space; the knowledge-gap hits identify prerequisite gaps in learner models. Neither performs the transfer of converting a user's semantic anchor-gaps into a leverage-ranked probe-budget allocator for open-ended concept-space traversal. The move is unperformed in the evidence.

references.title: NovAScore: A New Automated Metric for Evaluating Document Level Novelty
NoveltyRank: A Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Conceptual Novelty Estimation in AI Research
Optimizing Novelty of Top-k Recommendations using Large Language Models and Reinforcement Learning

novel.resemblance: NovAScore and NoveltyRank measure document-level novelty against a corpus; novelty-optimizing recommenders use RL to push recommendations away from already-seen items; exploration-exploitation recommenders balance proximity and distance. These share the ingredients of corpus-distance scoring and novelty reward gradients.
novel.still_new: No hit performs the specific two-component move: (1) a recognition gate that checks whether a find lands on the anchor's validated structural skeleton (keeping the find 'still about the same thing'), combined with (2) an evolving transcendence measure that scores the find by structural distance from the prior corpus specifically along the anchor's own joints, where the measure updates as the user accepts/rejects cards — making the inherited prior work a repulsive baseline along an attractive skeleton. Novelty scorers measure distance from a corpus globally; none use the anchor's own structural joints as the axis along which corpus-distance is computed, nor do they gate by skeleton-recognition before applying the repulsive gradient.
novel.reasoning: The novelty-scoring hits measure corpus-distance as a flat global signal; the recommender hits optimize for unexplored items without a skeleton-recognition gate. The specific transfer — using the anchor's structural joints as the coordinate system for the repulsive gradient, so the scorer simultaneously stays anchored to the inherited skeleton and pushes away from the inherited corpus along that same skeleton — is unperformed by any hit.
